detail: Duplicate flat slug complete-heart-block appears in Never-Miss and Atlas, but indexed routes are distinct.
recommended_action: Do not use a flat /ecg/[slug] route. Use indexed/nested routes such as /learn/ecg/never-miss/[slug] and /learn/ecg/atlas/[slug], or namespace slugs during import.
